acceptance.assertion: Each Captain action is explicitly marked high-impact.
Recovery or irreversibility is recorded before mutation.
Target changes require an explicit target-change record.

goal: Add explicitly marked Captain paths for merge, deploy, service restart, fleet mutation, and cleanup apply with recovery/irreversibility receipts.

metadata.claim_mode_note: Task claim mode describes implementation repository access; resulting grip effects are documented separately.
metadata.status_note: Open implementation PR exists; keep task unverified until PR review and merge evidence are present.
metadata.review_fix_scope: PR #97 hardens owner/repo target binding, wildcard target rejection, scope typing, irreversible record non-emptiness, and expected_head evidence binding.

title: Add captain privileged-action path
